output.title: Security Deposit Demand Letter: Recover Your Money Fast
output.meta_description: Need your security deposit back? Create a legally sound demand letter in minutes. Fast, state-specific templates for renters. Start your claim now.
content_outline: The Urgency of Security Deposit Recovery: Know Your Rights
What Is a Security Deposit Demand Letter and Why It Works
State-by-State Deadlines: From California to Texas and Florida
Security Deposit Demand Letter Template vs. Professional Service
How to Write a Security Deposit Refund Letter That Gets Results
What to Do When Your Landlord Won't Return Your Security Deposit
Step-by-Step: Sending Your Demand Letter via Certified Mail
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 60 days after move-out
A formal demand letter creates a legal paper trail and demonstrates serious intent to pursue the claim
State-specific templates ensure your letter cites the correct statutes and deadlines for maximum impact
Certified mail provides court-admissible proof that the landlord received your demand
DepositBack generates professional, state-tailored security deposit demand letters in under two minutes
output.cta: Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter in 2 minutes and take the first step toward recovering your deposit today.
output.target_audience: US renters who have moved out and are waiting for their landlord to return a security deposit, or whose landlord has missed the legal refund deadline
